---
title: "Institutions"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
source("scripts/site_helpers.R")
meta <- read_meta()
```

The TU9 universities. Shares are the corresponding-author OA share over the
period shown — as the single OpenAlex institution (ROR/OpenAlex), grouped with
its Leiden `component` affiliates (OpenAlex/Leiden), and that same Leiden member
set restricted to CWTS Core sources (Leiden/Core). Select a university for its
OA share by year, OA-status composition, and snapshot history.

```{r}
#| echo: false
institutions_table(meta$institutions, path_prefix = "")
```
